title: diplectria pallens
side_effects: Diplectria pallens can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, which may manifest as skin rashes, itching, or difficulty breathing. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can lead to stomach pain, nausea, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged use of the plant can also cause liver damage and kidney problems, as the body struggles to process its toxic alkaloids. Furthermore, improper use of diplectria pallens can also lead to cardiovascular issues, including irregular heartbeat and decreased blood pressure.
